case_title: CACH LLC VS. LINA O. AMADOR et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $285.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT AMADOR, LINA O.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC SERVED MAR-28-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AMADOR, LINA O.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT; INTEREST CALCULATION; PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 & 116.420 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMADOR, LINA O. $5,193.62 PRINCIPAL, $827.86 INTEREST, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,306.48, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
